title: MilKit
description: Weapons and armour mod for minecraft
body:
MilKit
Currently made for 1.16.5
Minecraft Gun and Armour mod for Forge with Five Weapons, Grenades and Armour. All guns and ammo can be crafted in survival(armour is not craftable currently). All firearms are fully 3d Modeled and textured by me

Current Content:

-M4A1
-M1911
-Grenade
-RPG 7
-UZI
-Minigun
-Chained Ammo(minigun)
-Ammo(Most Guns)
-Ak47
-Military Vest
-Military helmet
-Joggers
-fleece
-RPG rocket
-Riot Shield

Items for crafting the guns:

-Scope
-Barrel
-Handle
-Small Magazine
-Normal Magazine
-Stock
-Steel

More Armour and melees to come. I Might be adding more Guns.
